why_it_matters: ABG target balance exceeds 0.10 in a pilot/subset render; this is a validation warning, not a full-analysis failure.
recommended_fix: Confirm balance on the larger validation subset or full render before changing the weighting model.

why_it_matters: Tail-only fitted-probability extremes require transparent reporting but do not by themselves invalidate manuscript-facing plots.
recommended_fix: Keep the warning in the diagnostics summary and reassess if any flagged row affects the displayed central curve range.
